meaning: n.门房,(猎人住的)山林小屋,(游览区的)旅馆,(地方社团的)集会处vi.临时住宿,寄宿(某人家)vt.容纳,寄存,把...射入,存放,(向有关当局)提出(声明)
examples: He has four weeks in which to lodge an appeal.
I drove out of the gates, past the keeper's lodge.
He'd already started construction on a hunting lodge.
Killowen lodge holds a Battle of the Somme commemoration parade in Coleraine on an annual basis.
The lodge offers accommodation for birdwatchers, or you can wander its paths as a day visitor.
